CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties
Off Calendar Jul-15-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roger Jackson, Esq. 707-318-2994 for Plaintiff.
Theresa Sandhu, Esq. 408-313-1174 Specially appearing for Defendant Duke Hoffman.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Grant. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPU)
